Package io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.common

Interface StreamChatEventListener

public interface StreamChatEventListener
Unified callback interface for events from all configured platforms.

Callbacks are invoked from platform-specific worker threads, so listener implementations should be thread-safe.

Since:
1.0.0

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default void
    onBroadcastEnd(DonationPlatform platform, String channelId)
    Called when the platform reports that a broadcast has ended.
    default void
    onChat(DonationPlatform platform, String channelId, String nickname, String message)
    Called when a chat message is received.
    default void
    onConnect(DonationPlatform platform, String channelId)
    Called when a platform connection is established.
    default void
    onDisconnect(DonationPlatform platform, String channelId, String reason)
    Called when a platform connection is closed.
    default void
    onDonation(Donation donation)
    Called when a donation-related event is received.
    default void
    onError(DonationPlatform platform, String channelId, Exception ex)
    Called when an error occurs while processing a platform connection.
    default void
    onSubscription(Subscription subscription)
    Called when a subscription-related event is received.
    default void
    onSystemMessage(DonationPlatform platform, String channelId, String message)
    Called when a system message is received.

  • Method Details

    • onConnect

      default void onConnect(DonationPlatform platform, String channelId)
      Called when a platform connection is established.
      Parameters:
      platform - connected platform
      channelId - platform-specific channel identifier

    • onChat

      default void onChat(DonationPlatform platform, String channelId, String nickname, String message)
      Called when a chat message is received.
      Parameters:
      platform - source platform
      channelId - platform-specific channel identifier
      nickname - sender nickname, may be null
      message - chat message content

    • onSystemMessage

      default void onSystemMessage(DonationPlatform platform, String channelId, String message)
      Called when a system message is received.
      Parameters:
      platform - source platform
      channelId - platform-specific channel identifier
      message - system message content

    • onDonation

      default void onDonation(Donation donation)
      Called when a donation-related event is received.
      Parameters:
      donation - normalized donation payload

    • onSubscription

      default void onSubscription(Subscription subscription)
      Called when a subscription-related event is received.
      Parameters:
      subscription - normalized subscription payload

    • onBroadcastEnd

      default void onBroadcastEnd(DonationPlatform platform, String channelId)
      Called when the platform reports that a broadcast has ended.
      Parameters:
      platform - source platform
      channelId - platform-specific channel identifier

    • onDisconnect

      default void onDisconnect(DonationPlatform platform, String channelId, String reason)
      Called when a platform connection is closed.
      Parameters:
      platform - source platform
      channelId - platform-specific channel identifier
      reason - close reason, may be null

    • onError

      default void onError(DonationPlatform platform, String channelId, Exception ex)
      Called when an error occurs while processing a platform connection.
      Parameters:
      platform - source platform
      channelId - platform-specific channel identifier
      ex - raised exception
